title: Adidas India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Adidas India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adidas India Ventures Solutions:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India Ventures Solutions!
